device.name: Phonicbloom MMXX T-APE
device.description: Phonicbloom MMXX T-APE bytebeat synthesiser. ESP32-PICO-D4, 16 MB flash.

regions.name: Bootloader
regions.description: Starts up the chip and hands control to the firmware. Do not modify this region.

regions.name: Partition Table
regions.description: Maps where everything lives in flash memory. Do not modify this region.

regions.name: NVS Boot Storage
regions.description: Internal storage used by the chip at startup. Read only.

regions.name: OTA Data
regions.description: Stores which firmware slot the device boots from. Not used by the T-APE. Read only.

regions.name: Radio Calibration
regions.description: Radio calibration data unique to this chip. Written at the factory. Read only.

regions.name: Device Config
regions.description: Internal device configuration storage. Read only.

regions.name: Patches (User Saved Sounds)
regions.description: User Patches: 64 patches saved across 8 banks of 8 patches each. Download to back up. Upload to restore.

regions.name: Factory Patch Defaults
regions.description: Factory patches pre-loaded at manufacture. Download to restore factory sounds. Read only.

regions.name: Firmware
regions.description: The T-APE operating software. Download to back up before updating. Upload to update.

regions.name: Factory Samples
regions.description: The 8 original audio samples. Download to back up or extract. Read only.

regions.name: User Samples
regions.description: Reserved for custom samples. Upload user samples here.
